## Skills affected

<!-- List the skill folder names, e.g. alterlab-cdm-screenwriter -->

- `alterlab-{dept}-{name}`

## Checklist

- [ ] Skill follows the [mandatory template](./SKILL_TEMPLATE.md)
- [ ] No university-specific references (grep for "ieu", "izmir", "ekonomi")
- [ ] Line count is between 150-300 lines
- [ ] YAML frontmatter is valid (name + description fields present)
- [ ] 5+ example use cases included
- [ ] Emoji headers are in correct order: 🧠 🎯 🚨 📋 🛠️ 📊 🎭 📈 💡
- [ ] Agent name is CamelCase compound (e.g. CampaignStrategist)
- [ ] Description frontmatter includes multiple trigger phrases
- [ ] `npm run validate` passes locally

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill improvement
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure / tooling
